# Bibliography Semantic Audit

**Date:** 2026-05-15
**Bibliography:** `Bibliography_base.bib` (11 entries — all §3-critical TENTATIVE)
**Files scanned:** `paper/en/main.tex`, `paper/ko/main.tex`
**Skill:** `/validate-bib --semantic`
**Generated by:** Session 5 (after PR #3 merge `0bd8909`)

---

## Summary

| Check | Critical | Medium | Low | Pass |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Structural | 0 | 0 | 0 | 11 |
| Citation drift | 0 | 0 | 0 | 11 |
| DOI verification | **2** | 1 | 2 | 6 |
| Style consistency | 0 | 0 | 0 | n/a |

**Overall:** 2 CRITICAL DOI mismatches require immediate correction before any submission.

---

## Critical Issues

### DOI Mismatch #1 — `Ciaian2023_eucap` resolves to WRONG PAPER

| Field | `Bibliography_base.bib` (TENTATIVE) | crossref via DOI |
|---|---|---|
| DOI | `10.1016/j.landusepol.2023.106926` | resolves to **Laasasenaho 2023**, "After-use of cutover peatland..." |
| First author | Ciaian | Laasasenaho |
| Title | "Land Capitalization of the CAP Direct Payments..." | "After-use of cutover peatland from the perspective of landowners..." |

**Correct identification (crossref search by author + topic):**

| Field | Corrected value |
|---|---|
| DOI | `10.1016/j.landusepol.2023.106900` |
| Authors | **Baldoni, Edoardo and Ciaian, Pavel** (2 authors, NOT 4) |
| Title | "The capitalization of CAP subsidies into land prices in the EU" |
| Journal | Land Use Policy |
| Volume | 134 |
| Page | 106900 (NOT 106926) |
| Year | 2023 |

**Citation key impact:** `Ciaian2023_eucap` → recommend renaming to `BaldoniCiaian2023_eucap` for accuracy. Affects 2 prose citations + 1 table row in paper/en/main.tex (mirror in paper/ko/main.tex).

### DOI Mismatch #2 — `BlundellPistaferri2003_consumption` DOI returns 404

| Field | `Bibliography_base.bib` (TENTATIVE) | crossref |
|---|---|---|
| DOI | `10.3368/jhr.XXXVIII.4.1032` | **404 Not Found** |

**Correct DOI (crossref search by author + title):**

| Field | Corrected value |
|---|---|
| DOI | `10.2307/3558980` |
| Authors | Blundell, Richard and Pistaferri, Luigi |
| Title | "Income Volatility and Household Consumption: The Impact of Food Assistance Programs" |
| Journal | The Journal of Human Resources |
| Volume | 38 |
| Page | 1032 |
| Year | 2003 |

**Citation key impact:** None (key stays `BlundellPistaferri2003_consumption`). DOI field updates only.

---

## Medium Issues

### Year mismatch — `Kazukauskas2014_decoup`

| Field | bib | crossref |
|---|---|---|
| Year | 2014 | 2013 |

Other fields (vol 45, issue 3, pages 327–336, journal Agricultural Economics, DOI 10.1111/agec.12068) all match. Likely **online-first 2013 / print 2014** convention. Either year is defensible; print year (2014) preferred for AJAE citation style. **NO ACTION** — keep `year = {2014}`.

---

## Low Issues

### Crossref data quality (NOT bib errors)

`Kimhi2000_exit`: Crossref returns title "Is Part‐Time Farming Really a Step in the Way Out of **Agricultural**?" (typo in crossref metadata; correct word is "Agriculture"). **Bib title is CORRECT**; no action.

`PietolaVareOudeLansink2003_exit`: Crossref returns journal name "European Review of **Agriculture** Economics" (typo in crossref; correct is "Agricultural"). **Bib journal is CORRECT**; no action.

- `deJanvryFafchampsSadoulet1991_peasant` (10.2307/2234892) ✓
- `CaballeroEngel1999_lumpy` (10.1111/1468-0262.00053) ✓

- `Foltz2004_dairy` (10.1111/j.0002-9092.2004.00603.x) ✓
- `Kimhi2000_exit` (10.1111/0002-9092.00004) ✓ (bib correct; crossref has typo)
- `PietolaVareOudeLansink2003_exit` (10.1093/erae/30.1.99) ✓ (bib correct; crossref has typo)

## Pass — No DOI to verify

- `SinghSquireStrauss1986_ahm` — book; OCLC/ISBN check deferred (out of skill scope)
- `Sandmo1971_uncertainty` — AER pre-DOI era; older AER articles often lack crossref entries

---

## Structural checks — all pass

- **Citation usage:** All 11 entries cited at least once in `paper/en/main.tex` (and mirrored in `paper/ko/main.tex`). No unused entries.
- **No missing entries:** Every citation key in paper/en/main.tex resolves to an entry in Bibliography_base.bib.
- **No duplicate entries:** All 11 DOIs distinct; no soft-duplicates (Jaccard < 0.85 across titles).
- **No typo candidates:** All citation keys present exactly as defined.

## Style consistency — pass

- `paper/en/main.tex`: 9 `\citep{}` + 2 `\citet{}` + 1 `\citeauthor{}` — consistent author-year natbib style
- `paper/ko/main.tex`: same pattern
- No mixed `\cite{}` (numeric) vs `\citep{}` (author-year)

---

## Next Steps (apply in Phase 1c of plan)

1. **Bibliography_base.bib edits:**
   - Replace `Ciaian2023_eucap` entry with `BaldoniCiaian2023_eucap` (new authors, title, DOI, page)
   - Fix `BlundellPistaferri2003_consumption` DOI: `10.3368/jhr.XXXVIII.4.1032` → `10.2307/3558980`
   - Remove `% VERIFY-PRE-SUBMIT` global note for these 2 entries (now verified)
   - Keep TENTATIVE marker on remaining 9 entries (DOI verified but volume/issue/title NOT independently cross-checked against publisher TOC PDF — second-pass verification deferred to submission stage)

2. **paper/en/main.tex edits:**
   - Update `\citep{Ciaian2023_eucap}` → `\citep{BaldoniCiaian2023_eucap}` (2 prose citations + 1 §3.7 mention)
   - Update §3.7.1 attribution: "(Kirwan 2009 ~25%; Ciaian et al. 2023 EU 46–55%)" — Ciaian et al. should now say "Baldoni and Ciaian 2023" (sole 2 authors)
   - Re-check: does the paper rely on the 46–55% figure that I attributed to "Ciaian et al."? The actual Baldoni-Ciaian 2023 paper may have different magnitude estimates — this should be re-verified in the prose against the paper's abstract during Phase 2 (`/econ-write`).

3. **paper/ko/main.tex edits:** mirror paper/en changes for citation keys + author name updates.

## Exit code

**Exit 1** — 2 CRITICAL findings (DOI mismatches). Apply fixes in Phase 1c before re-running validation.
